summary: Solid soundboard capture of a classic mid‑84 performance, praised as well‑played and representative of the strong Fall ’84 tour despite some misnamed tracks.
review: Both reviewers give the show four stars, noting it as an enjoyable and well‑played example of the Cream of ’84 era. The recording is a soundboard source that sounds clear, though several track titles are mislabeled in this release. Overall the performance and audio quality make it a worthwhile listen for fans of the 1984 fall tour.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently positive 4‑star reviews highlight a strong show and good soundboard quality; limited detail lowers confidence to medium.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Audio is clear and enjoyable; only issue noted is mislabeling of tracks (1‑5, 7‑9, 13, 17).

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewers describe the concert as well‑played and representative of a strong Fall ’84 tour, suggesting a solid overall flow.
